summary: The protagonist, engaged in an S-level quest to eliminate giants, encounters the boss, the Mad Ruler of Arperium, who claims he was framed by a sorcerer named Kromar. After choosing to believe the giant and accepting a new quest to kill Kromar, the protagonist is betrayed by the NPC in a surprise attack. Realizing the deception, the protagonist prepares to fight back after being caught off guard.
key_moments: The protagonist encounters the boss, Floe, who claims Kromar is the true villain.
A new quest is accepted to eliminate Kromar in exchange for a sacred item.
Floe betrays the protagonist with a surprise attack, revealing the NPC's deception.
